channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🔴 Dossier 2026-03-12 — ⚡ Storm · Gold: MKTX
item.description:
🔴 ⚡ Storm · SPY ▼ 0.1% · VIX 25.4

VIX is flashing 25.

🥇 Gold Pick: MKTX — Score: 49/100 (C)

📡 73 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"One day at a time. One trade at a time. One lesson at a time. The market doesn't care about yesterday." — Sam
